posts.author: Ultraviolet (A. Albaajari)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,
My legal department is considering using App4Legal to manage their workflows. We acquired Monday.com licenses recently and started integrating the projects across our organisation. Has anyone had experience with App4Legal? Are there any features that are not covered by Monday? Appreciate your time and help.
